home.heroSubheadline: Natural wellness shop — Forever Living and a curated selection from Yarit
home.featuredSubheadline: The products I love most, carefully chosen for you
home.foreverBody: Yarit is an authorized Forever Living distributor — the world's leading company for pure aloe vera products. Browse dozens of items from the official catalog, all shipped directly from us with personal packaging and support.

meetYarit.heading: Hi, I'm Yarit
meetYarit.body: Shoresh is my little shop — a place for products I genuinely trust and use every day myself. I'm here to help, answer questions, and find the right thing for you together.

testimonials.heading: Thank you, from the heart
testimonials.subheading: A handful of customers who have been with us for months, and years

t1.name: Michal A.
t1.quote: Yarit has guided me since day one. The products are excellent and I keep coming back — amazing service.

t2.name: Ronit S.
t2.quote: I found exactly what I was looking for at Yarit's, with a detailed personal explanation of every product. Highly recommend!

t3.name: Dana K.
t3.quote: Forever's aloe changed my skincare routine. Thank you Yarit for the spot-on recommendation.

shop.title: The shop
shop.subtitle: {count} products
shop.description: We're still building the catalog. Soon you'll be able to browse all of Yarit's Forever Living products alongside her curated selection of natural wellness picks.

about.title: About
about.heading: Shoresh — natural wellness from the heart
about.body: Shoresh is the online home of Yarit, an authorized Forever Living distributor. Here you'll find a curated range of high-quality natural products — Forever Living's catalog alongside other wellness picks Yarit loves — all in one place, with personal guidance and warm service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: We're happy to help
contact.body: Got a question about a product, need advice, or want to order something special? Message Yarit directly.
contact.comingSoon: A contact form is coming soon

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.noShippingForRegion: No shipping options found for this region. Please contact us.
checkout.mockNotice: Dev mode: no real charge. When a payment gateway is connected, the payment will go through it.
checkout.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.heading: Thank you for your order!
success.subheading: We've received your order. A confirmation has been sent to your email.
